author: Video Games Chronicle
text: The Wolf Among Us 2 and a remaster of the original announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 The Wolf Among Us 2 is coming in 2027, and The Wolf Among Us Remastered is coming Holiday 2026.

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Final Fantasy 7 Remake Part 3 is called Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, will be released on all platforms simultaneously The game will be released in Spring 2027

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Shift Up reveals Stellar Blade sequel, Blood Rain The sequel will not be a PlayStation 5 exclusive like the original was

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Clutch, the debut title from ex-Forza Horizon devs’ studio Maverick Games, gets its first full trailer The game was officially announced earlier this week

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Sonic Pico Park is a new ‘indie’ co-op Sonic the Hedgehog game It's the first co-op entry since Sonic Superstars three years ago

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance launches in 2027

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Assassin’s Creed creator Patrice Désilets’ 1666: Amsterdam is officially back from the dead A prologue is available now on PC

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Gameplay trailer for Respawn’s strategy game Star Wars Zero Company confirms an August release The date was leaked earlier this week ahead of its Summer Game Fest reveal

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: RuneScape: Dragonwilds is leaving Early Access and coming to PS5 and Xbox Series X/S in September The co-op survival crafting game launched on Steam Early Access a year ago

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio’s Virtua Fighter project is officially titled Virtua Fighter Crossroads A new showcase for the game will take place later today
